title: Generated verilog can create output nets without defined nettype
body:
## Steps to reproduce the issue

See [gist illustrating carry-save adder](https://gist.github.com/jrmoserbaltimore/f3fa09edcf1670f332b3bda9b9a7eefd#file-carrysaveadder-v-L27-L29), with output produced by Amaranth using yosys verilog backend.

Marked lines do not indicate a nettype.  When combined with other RTL, particularly including a SystemVerilog which uses `default_nettype none`, elaboration fails in some tools

## Expected behavior

Should interoperate with other code.  In this case, the indicated signals should be defined as a wire or register.

## Actual behavior

Elaboration fails in some tools.  Vivado 2021.2.1 particularly rejected the code produced by the verilog generator due to the existence of another file in the project which declared a default nettype of `none`.
